title: • Strict Rules:
content:
• Strict Rules:
• ❌ No outside help or notes.
• ✍ Handwritten only.
• 🧠 Purely their own thoughts and analysis.
• Goal: If they score above 90%, they:
• 🎤 Earn the right to take over a portion of a future class.
• 🎖 Gain special recognition as a course “Scholar”
• 🏆 Unlock bonus grading flexibility (e.g., dropping lowest score).

✅ Why This Works:
• Offers an alternative pathway for students who excel through self-directed study.
• Reinforces academic competition in a fun, low-pressure way.
• Encourages deep critical thinking without external resources.

4️⃣ Peer Review, Research Weeks, & Balance Between Instructor Guidance & Student Independence

📜 Adjustments to Peer Review Timing

✅ Moving Peer Review earlier (Week 13 instead of Week 14).
context: From document: Comprehensive Course Structure and Alternating Schedule (A & B Weeks… — chunk 36 (chunk 36/108)
